name: Deviled Rock Lobster or Crab
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Add grated onion and cook until tender.
3. Stir in dried mustard, Tabasco sauce, lemon juice, salt, and flour.
4. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly to form a creamy sauce.
5. Cook over low heat until the mixture thickens.
6. Stir in sherry and Parmesan cheese until well combined.
7. Serve the filling in flaky pastry shells or individual dishes.
8. This recipe serves 6 people.
"Talk About Good" Published by the Junior League of Lafayette, LA.
Submitted by Mrs. Robert A. Chenoweth.
